title: Surface Mapping Runs
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(CASE WHEN ProbesUsed <= EfficiencyTarget THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS efficient FROM SAAScanComplete WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {count} DSS mapping run(s) · {efficient} at or under probe efficiency target
details.help: SAAScanComplete events from surface detail scanning. Efficient = probes used ≤ efficiency target
